title: The Ones Who Stay
overview: Alexandre, a somewhat lost thirty-something, decides to start out in the professional world. Loris, his misanthropic roommate, works on a universal method to succeed in life, and Patrick, Alexandre's father, decides to stop his chemotherapy. Everything is on track, until Manon shows up in their lives.

trailers.title: LES ÉTOILES RESTANTES - Bande Annonce officielle (2018)
